description_long: This is an adult male figure dressed in formal business attire, featuring a tailored suit jacket, collared dress shirt, and a necktie. The figure wears straight-cut dress pants and formal shoes, presenting a professional and polished appearance. The posture is upright with arms slightly extended outward, suggesting a neutral, at-rest stance. The facial features are clean-shaven, and the hair is neatly styled and combed back. The clothing fits well, with the jacket extending just past the waist and the pants falling to the tops of the shoes. No accessories or carried objects are visible, and the overall look is that of a typical urban professional.
description: A formally dressed adult male in a business suit, standing upright with arms slightly out. The figure has a neat hairstyle and wears dress shoes, presenting a professional urban appearance.
description_view_0: Front view shows the suit jacket, tie, dress shirt, and facial features clearly, with arms slightly out to the sides.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the face, the straight cut of the jacket and pants, and the side of the shoes.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the head, jacket, and pants, with both arms visible and the jacket hem slightly curved.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the profile, jacket, pants, and shoes from the opposite side.
attribute_clothing_type: business suit with collared dress shirt and necktie
